'''dhathoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudoalterin|pseudoalterin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudoalterin|pseudoalterin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhathoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæthereth|dhæthereth]] || [[word:dhætherej|dhætherej]] || [[word:dhætheresh|dhætheresh]] || [[word:dhæthere|dhæthere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathothoroth|dhathothoroth]] || [[word:dhathothoroj|dhathothoroj]] || [[word:dhathothorosh|dhathothorosh]] || [[word:dhathothoro|dhathothoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathoroth|dhathoroth]] || [[word:dhathoroj|dhathoroj]] || [[word:dhathorosh|dhathorosh]] || [[word:dhathoro|dhathoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathofroth|dhathofroth]] || [[word:dhathofroj|dhathofroj]] || [[word:dhathofrosh|dhathofrosh]] || [[word:dhathofrof|dhathofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhathorotho|dhathorotho]] || [[word:dhathorojo|dhathorojo]] || [[word:dhathorosho|dhathorosho]] || [[word:dhathoroko|dhathoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhathoroth|dhathoroth]] || [[word:dhathoroj|dhathoroj]] || [[word:dhathorosh|dhathorosh]] || [[word:dhathoro|dhathoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhathorothol|dhathorothol]] || [[word:dhathorojol|dhathorojol]] || [[word:dhathoroshol|dhathoroshol]] || [[word:dhathorokol|dhathorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhathorothotho|dhathorothotho]] || [[word:dhathorojojo|dhathorojojo]] || [[word:dhathoroshosho|dhathoroshosho]] || [[word:dhathoroko|dhathoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhathorothon|dhathorothon]] || [[word:dhathorojon|dhathorojon]] || [[word:dhathoroshon|dhathoroshon]] || [[word:dhathorokon|dhathorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhathorothoro|dhathorothoro]] || [[word:dhathorojoro|dhathorojoro]] || [[word:dhathoroshoro|dhathoroshoro]] || [[word:dhathorokoro|dhathorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
